gallowsford.name: Gallowsford
gallowsford.desc: A starved market town sewn into the mouth of the Grey Road. Paper moves faster than bread here; coin moves faster than both.

services.label: Rest at the Black Lantern Inn
services.desc: A room with doors that lock.

services.label: Hear a rumor at the inn
services.desc: The innkeeper knows more than her patrons.

services.label: Seek papers at the gate
services.desc: An Iron Lantern clerk can issue travel writs — for a fee.

services.label: Visit the rookery drain contact
services.desc: Below the ditch, a door you remember.

services.label: Ask the chapel for healing
services.desc: Sister Reed knows every prayer that still works.

greyhook_fortress.name: Greyhook Fortress
greyhook_fortress.desc: Greyhook rises like a clenched jaw. Three searches. No humor. Even the chaplains carry keys they are not supposed to use.

services.label: Seek infirmary cover
services.desc: Only available with infirmary route access. Medical cover lowers alert.

services.label: Treat with the quartermaster
services.desc: The quartermaster trades keys for plausible deniability.

synod_archive.name: Synod Archive
synod_archive.desc: Tall shelves, thinner air, and more names than the living are allowed to speak. The scribes do not look up often.

services.label: Ask a scribe about the archive
services.desc: Scribes remember what they read but not who asked.

services.label: Seek ritual license

effect.clue: A ritual license mentions sealed testimony.

services.desc: An old license grants religious access to sealed documents.
